'''zhanoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:docklands|docklands]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-n-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:docklands|docklands]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| zhanoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhæneyeth|zhæneyeth]] || [[word:zhæneyej|zhæneyej]] || [[word:zhæneyesh|zhæneyesh]] || [[word:zhæneye|zhæneye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhanonoyoth|zhanonoyoth]] || [[word:zhanonoyoj|zhanonoyoj]] || [[word:zhanonoyosh|zhanonoyosh]] || [[word:zhanonoyo|zhanonoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhanoyoth|zhanoyoth]] || [[word:zhanoyoj|zhanoyoj]] || [[word:zhanoyosh|zhanoyosh]] || [[word:zhanoyo|zhanoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhanofyoth|zhanofyoth]] || [[word:zhanofyoj|zhanofyoj]] || [[word:zhanofyosh|zhanofyosh]] || [[word:zhanofyof|zhanofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:zhanoyotho|zhanoyotho]] || [[word:zhanoyojo|zhanoyojo]] || [[word:zhanoyosho|zhanoyosho]] || [[word:zhanoyoko|zhanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:zhanoyoth|zhanoyoth]] || [[word:zhanoyoj|zhanoyoj]] || [[word:zhanoyosh|zhanoyosh]] || [[word:zhanoyo|zhanoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:zhanoyothol|zhanoyothol]] || [[word:zhanoyojol|zhanoyojol]] || [[word:zhanoyoshol|zhanoyoshol]] || [[word:zhanoyokol|zhanoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:zhanoyothotho|zhanoyothotho]] || [[word:zhanoyojojo|zhanoyojojo]] || [[word:zhanoyoshosho|zhanoyoshosho]] || [[word:zhanoyoko|zhanoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:zhanoyothon|zhanoyothon]] || [[word:zhanoyojon|zhanoyojon]] || [[word:zhanoyoshon|zhanoyoshon]] || [[word:zhanoyokon|zhanoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:zhanoyothoro|zhanoyothoro]] || [[word:zhanoyojoro|zhanoyojoro]] || [[word:zhanoyoshoro|zhanoyoshoro]] || [[word:zhanoyokoro|zhanoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
